name: Paycom
description: Paycom is a leading provider of payroll and human resources software, offering a comprehensive online payroll management system that streamlines processes for accurate and timely payroll. Their innovative tools, including the employee-guided payroll feature Beti®, empower employees to manage their payroll data, reducing errors and enhancing the overall payroll experience.

name: Paylocity
description: Paylocity offers a comprehensive payroll software solution designed to streamline and automate payroll processes, reducing manual entry and errors. Their platform enhances the employee experience with features like self-service access to pay information and automated expense management, ensuring timely and accurate payroll while easing tax compliance.

name: SD Worx UK
description: SD Worx offers a cutting-edge cloud-based payroll software that enhances efficiency and accuracy in payroll processing, allowing in-house teams to streamline operations and make data-driven decisions. With features like automated payroll processing and real-time reporting, it supports organizations in managing complex payroll requirements effectively.

name: PrimePay
description: PrimePay offers a web-based payroll software designed to simplify payroll processing for HR professionals, ensuring a high standard of service. Their platform allows users to manage payroll efficiently and effectively, making it easier to handle workforce complexities.

name: UKG
description: UKG is a prominent provider of Human Capital Management solutions, offering a robust payroll software that ensures accurate and timely pay while reducing manual errors. Their UKG Pro – Pay system streamlines complex payroll computations and provides employees with easy access to their payroll information, enhancing financial security and overall work experience.

name: HRWARE
description: HRWARE is a technology leader in the Canadian HRMS market, offering payroll and HR software solutions.

name: AAB Payroll Inc
description: The company specializes in payroll solutions, providing a user-friendly Payroll Software that integrates with their Time & Attendance and Employee Self Service platforms. Their comprehensive approach ensures a seamless experience for managing payroll and compliance.

name: PayFit
description: PayFit offers a smart and automated payroll software solution that simplifies payroll management for small and medium-sized businesses. With features like quick payslip generation, real-time updates, and robust reporting capabilities, it significantly reduces the time and complexity associated with payroll processes.

name: BrightPay UK
city: The Municipal District of Laytown — Bettystown
description: BrightPay is a prominent provider of payroll software that simplifies payroll management for businesses, offering both desktop and cloud-based solutions. Their software is fully HMRC recognized, supports all RTI submission types, and includes features for auto-enrollment, making it a reliable choice for efficient payroll processing.

name: Moorepay
description: Moorepay offers a comprehensive cloud-based payroll software solution that is HMRC-recognized and designed to streamline payroll processing through automation, ensuring accuracy and compliance with the latest legislation. Their system integrates seamlessly with existing tools, providing real-time visibility and easy access to payroll data, making it ideal for organizations of various sizes looking for efficient payroll management.
